title: desmodium saxatile
intro: Desmodium saxatile, also known as Tick clover or Climbing tick trefoil, is a perennial vine native to Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Desmodium saxatile include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antacid and digestive aid. Desmodium saxatile is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and is also used in traditional herbal remedies.
